title: Buildah bud does not work with SELinux
body:
buildah bud was not setting the mount label on the image
so SELinux in enforcing mode is blocking writing to the image

This patch also fixes a similar problem with the `buildah mount`
command

Signed-off-by: Daniel J Walsh <dwalsh@redhat.com>

comments.body:
@TomSweeneyRedHat @nalind PTAL
We need this one quick to get it into RHEL.
Yes How did I miss that...
@nalind Should we just remove this param and have it happen automatically?
